title: Creamy Pesto Pasta
description: A simple pasta dish with a rich and creamy pesto sauce.
instructions: Cook the penne pasta in a large pot of boiling water until al dente.
In a separate saucepan, heat the pesto sauce over medium heat.
Add the creamy sauce to the pesto sauce and stir until combined.
Add the grated Parmesan cheese to the sauce and stir until melted.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the saucepan with the pesto sauce.
Toss the pasta in the sauce until well coated.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
